race.comment: KING BREW (2) just missed at York on debut but showed it was no fluke when just missing out over 1200m on the Scarpside here most recently. He's shown some adaptability in his two starts, so the wide draw mightn't be too much of an issue. Looks to be trending the right way and can land the knockout blow this time. BATISTA (5) just missed out over 1400m here last time out after sitting handy in the run for Pike. The Wizard remains in the irons today and maybe the drop back to 1300m is they key. Rates highly on that recent effort and can go one better. BHULLAR (8) was 1.6L off the winner last time out on the quick turnaround. She'll need some luck from the draw, but she has good early speed and Steve Parnham sticks with her. Can see her going one better. THOR'S ANGEL (12) is on debut here and has shown enough at the trials to suggest she can run well fresh. FORGOTTEN SON (6) can improve on a handy performance fresh in tougher company.
